name: codex-security-cloud
description: Access Codex Security Cloud scan findings from local Codex credentials.

interface.shortDescription: List and inspect Codex Security Cloud findings.
interface.longDescription: Codex Security Cloud adds local workflows for querying ChatGPT-hosted Codex Security Cloud Aardvark findings through a logged-in Chrome context and local Codex ChatGPT credentials.
defaultPrompt: List Codex Security Cloud findings for this repo.
Show the latest Codex Security Cloud finding details.
Check which Codex Security Cloud repos are accessible.
